name: Hearty Garden Wraps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, melt the butter until sizzling. Stir in the coleslaw mix, mushrooms, onion, garlic, salt, and red pepper flakes. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are crisply tender (3 to 4 minutes). Remove from heat. Stir in the cheese and rice.
2. Place about 1 cup of filling in the center of each warm tortilla. Fold two opposite edges of the tortilla toward the center over the filling. Roll up the open end of the tortilla toward the opposite edge. Place, seam-side down, on a microwave-safe plate.
3. Microwave two sandwiches on high, turning or rearranging after half the time, until heated through (1 to 2 minutes). Repeat with the remaining sandwiches. Tip: 4 ounces (1 cup) coarsely chopped roast beef or corned beef can be added. Makes 4 sandwiches. Each sandwich: 560 calories; 31g fat.
